battery_optimization_warning.description: Battery optimization is enabled for VShop. This may prevent wishlist notifications from working properly.

donate_msg: Support the development and get access to Wishlist Notifications by donating any amount. Thanks a lot <3
no_nightmarket: The Night Market will return soon.
promotional: See your Valorant shop anywhere, anytime.

purchase.success: Your order is processing. An app restart may be required to see your perks.

region_info: Please make sure you select the correct region, otherwise your shop will be inaccurate.
signin_info: Your login details will be sent directly to Riot Games.

available.description: A newer version of VShop is available to download
available.title: Update available

welcome_back_info: Sit tight, while we log you back in.

notification.error: An error occurred while checking your shop
notification.info: Get a notication when your wishlisted item is in the shop.
notification.name: Wishlist Notification
notification.no_hit: No luck today: No wishlisted skin is in your shop.
notification.no_permission: We don't have permission to send you notifications!

shop_page.subtitle: Welcome back to your daily store.
shop_page.empty_subtitle: Try another search or switch back to all skins.

bundles_page.title: Featured bundles
bundles_page.subtitle: Explore the current collection and preview every included skin.
bundles_page.empty_subtitle: The featured collection is empty right now. Check back later.

night_market_page.title: Night market
night_market_page.subtitle: Limited-time deals with reduced prices on selected skins.
night_market_page.empty_subtitle: No discounted offers are available in this rotation yet.

gallery_page.title: Skin gallery
gallery_page.subtitle: Browse your collection and save favorites for wishlist tracking.
gallery_page.empty_subtitle: Try a different keyword or clear the wishlist filter.

accessories_page.title: Accessory rotation
accessories_page.subtitle: Cards, sprays, buddies and titles available for kingdom credits.
accessories_page.empty_subtitle: Try another keyword to find items in this rotation.

equipment_page.title: Equipment collection
equipment_page.subtitle: Buddies, sprays, cards and titles in one place.
equipment_page.empty_subtitle: Try a different search term or category.

history_page.title: Match History
history_page.subtitle: Tracker-style recent matches with result, KDA, ACS, and pace at a glance.
history_page.empty_subtitle: Pull to refresh once your match history is available.

summary.snapshot_subtitle: Results, match pace, and key stats from your latest games.

equip_page.error_loading: Unable to load your loadout. Pull to refresh and try again.
equip_page.missing_auth: Sign in to see your current equipment.

settings_page.title: Utilities
settings_page.disclaimer: VShop is not endorsed by Riot Games in any way. Riot Games, Valorant, and all associated properties are trademarks or registered trademarks of Riot Games, Inc.

update_popup.checking_description: Looking for both OTA patches and newer app releases.
update_popup.idle_description: Check whether this build can download a newer update.
update_popup.ota_description: A new JS/UI update is available for this build. Download it now and the app will reload without reinstalling.
update_popup.native_dev_description: This session is running in Expo Go or a development build, so it cannot apply production OTA updates. Build one preview/production app once, then future JS/UI fixes can update in-app.
update_popup.native_description: A newer native build is available. This specific release still needs a new install because the native layer changed.
update_popup.current_description: No newer release was found. To update inside the app later, ship one preview/production build with expo-updates enabled.
update_popup.up_to_date_description: No newer update is available for this build right now.
